---
date: ""
disableComments: true
slug: ""
title: Teaching
output: html_document
---

I've given educational talks and lectures from time to time. Here are some of the talks I've given in industry settings for non-academic audiences.

# Research

<span class="date" style="font-family:'Lucida Console', Monaco, monospace">2019/04</span> - <a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1i-E_XfFqh35g_m6VuLfiBd_5jsdJDrPJLQKw8J6GbDE">Control in research design</a>

<span style="margin-left:30px;display:block;margin-top:-10px">I talk about what "control" means in research design, and what some basic controlled research designs look like.</span>


# Psychology

<span class="date" style="font-family:'Lucida Console', Monaco, monospace">2019/04</span> - <a href="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1yJlEKKJ31q5y8EwctQ4YtetD2ckEiDoFqdHaL-J8KxM">A whirlwind tour of persuasion psychology</a>

<span style="margin-left:30px;display:block;margin-top:-10px">I talk about the foundations of persuasion psychology. Covers human evolution, irrationality, heuristics and biases, cognitive dissonance, and social norms.</span>
